name: Game Engine & Real-Time Simulation
description: 游戏开发:游戏循环、物理与实时渲染

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['game','game_loop','physics','rendering_game'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(game loop|game engine|fixed timestep|entity component|collision detection|frame budget|sprite|game physics|unity|unreal|godot)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
